context_notes: Phase 62 is mid-/gsd-plan-phase orchestration. Init→Research→Validation→PatternMapping done. Planner spawn was the next step but user interrupted — not a workflow problem, just a checkpoint. CONTEXT.md is unusually thorough (D-01..D-29), UI-SPEC.md is approved, RESEARCH.md verified all CONTEXT.md 'Planner verifies...' items including SiteGeneratorService line numbers (still 868 LOC), Repository APIs (all already exist post-V6), and the D-19 implementation path (internal iteration without public signature change). PATTERNS.md mapped 28 files with 27 analogs (1 first-of-kind: golden snapshot baseline). Planner prompt was drafted with: hard invariants (SC4 byte-identical, no inline styles, lean Thymeleaf, OSIV active, coverage ≥82%, D-19 tracked behavior change, PLAYOFF tab uses existing playoff.html), per-plan goal sketches for Plans 0-7, sequential dependency chain, and resolutions to RESEARCH.md's 5 open questions.
